title: MCLN EX93 Cigarette Billing v1.4
fullText:
313690 344805 0 0 EX 9 3 – Cigarette Billing Contents TOC \o "1-6" \h \z \u 1 Enhancement Revision History PAGEREF _Toc162455482 \h 2 2 EX93 – Cigarette Billing PAGEREF _Toc162455483 \h 3 2.1 Summary Information PAGEREF _Toc162455484 \h 3 2.2 Overview PAGEREF _Toc162455485 \h 3 2.3 Assumptions PAGEREF _Toc162455486 \h 3 2.4 Platform Information PAGEREF _Toc162455487 \h 3 3 Process Flow Diagram PAGEREF _Toc162455488 \h 3 4 UI PAGEREF _Toc162455489 \h 4 5 MHE PAGEREF _Toc162455490 \h 4 6 RF PAGEREF _Toc162455491 \h 4 7 Process Change/Addition PAGEREF _Toc162455492 \h 4 7.1 Adjust Location Inventory Web Service PAGEREF _Toc162455493 \h 4 7.1.1 Overview PAGEREF _Toc162455494 \h 4 7.1.2 Enablement PAGEREF _Toc162455495 \h 4 7.1.3 Updates PAGEREF _Toc162455496 \h 5 7.1.3.1 Activity Tracking PAGEREF _Toc162455497 \h 5 7.1.3.2 PIX PAGEREF _Toc162455498 \h 5 7.1.3.3 LM Hooks PAGEREF _Toc162455499 \h 5 8 Reporting, Label, or Document PAGEREF _Toc162455500 \h 5 9 Other Solutions Included in Extension PAGEREF _Toc162455501 \h 5 10 Performance Expectations PAGEREF _Toc162455502 \h 5 11 Required Data Setup PAGEREF _Toc162455503 \h 5 11.1 System Codes PAGEREF _Toc162455504 \h 5 11.2 Database PAGEREF _Toc162455505 \h 5 11.2.1 Purge and Archive PAGEREF _Toc162455506 \h 5 11.3 Custom Configurations PAGEREF _Toc162455507 \h 6 11.3.1 System Code Types PAGEREF _Toc162455508 \h 6 11.3.2 System Code Parameters PAGEREF _Toc162455509 \h 6 11.3.3 Messages PAGEREF _Toc162455510 \h 6 12 Test Cases PAGEREF _Toc162455511 \h 6 12.1 General Conditions PAGEREF _Toc162455512 \h 6 13 Questions and Answers PAGEREF _Toc162455513 \h 6 Enhancement Revision History Changed By Date Version Notes: Alex Jones 03/19/2024 1 .0 Original document. Alex Jones 03/20/2024 1.1 Added archive logic for new custom fields Alex Jones 03/27/2024 1.2 Using custom instead of base field for import, post import data storage Alex Jones 04/11/2024 1.3 Added flag to indicate whether AID records have been processed Cody Ramangkoun 06/27/2024 1.3 Updated assumptions & tech db references Alex Jones 12/09/2024 1.4 Replace EX01/EX11 with new AID reference field EX 9 3 – Cigarette Billing McLane has a need for the ability to track their cigarette replenishments by billing timestamp. To assist in tracking, WM is modified to allow users to import billing timestamp on the order line. WM will then ensure that same billing timestamp value is populated on order line item and allocation records, and finally onto the task detail for any cigarette replenishments. Summary Information Customer Name: McLane Customer Code: MCLN Subproject Codes: TBD Change Request Number: Overview Functional Area Enhanced Additional Information User Interface (UI) N MHE N RF N Reporting N Other Y Order and SWFO import process , new columns in ORDER_LINE_ITEM, ALLOC_INVN_DTL and TASK_DTL This change will take place for cigarette replenishment tasks and will therefore affect the following Inventory Need Types: INT 99 - Replen Actv2Actv CIG, 3 - Repl actv from CsPk (Task Types Replen Active From Case Pick 40 CIG, Replen Active From Case Pick 50 CIG, and Replen Active From Case Pick 60 CIG) . Assumptions The billing timestamp field will only be sent and used for those orders or SWFOs which contain cigarette items. Only cigarette replenishment tasks will be modified to include the billing timestamp. No data validations will be performed on the imported billing timestamp field. The billing timestamp fiel d is imported and populated with no logical changes made based on its value . In the event a single cigarette replenishment task creates with order line allocations records tied to more then 1 Billing Timestamp, WM will select the first not Null record fetched from those allocations to record on the remaining allocation and t ask records . For a Wave which has more than one Billing T imestamp populated for Cigarette Item/From Zone/To Zone Combination s ( WaveAllocationType ) , WM will select the first not Null timestamp and stamp that value on the remaining allocation and task records A cigarette item on a single customer/forecast order cannot have identical WaveAllocationType lettering on the orderline (ex. AEO and aeo ). In the event that an order is sent with multiple line items for the same item/allocation type combinatio n, WM will select a single timestamp and stamp that value on the remaining allocation and task records Allocation ty pe is always available at the order line item level and stored in ORDER_LINE_ITEM.ALLOC_TYPE Dependencies Code Dependencies None EX01 – Cigarettes Inventory Conversion EX11 – Cigarette Active to Active Replenishment P latform Information Solution: Solution Platform: Solution Version: Warehouse Management Open Systems Oracle/ Tomcat /RHEL 201 9 Proces s Flow Diagram Process Steps : WMOS receives a distribution order or shipment with full order xml containing custom BillingTime field within an order line item. WMOS updates custom field ORDER_LINE_ITEM. REF_FIELD11 with the value populated in < BillingTime > . A wave is run on a distribution order or shipment where ORDER_LINE_ITEM. REF_FIELD11 is not null. The created Allocation Inventory Detail record is updated to populate custom column ALLOC_INVN_DTL. C_EX93_ALLOC_TYPE with the WaveAllocationType N ote: ALLOC_INVN_DTL.A C_EX93_A LLOC_TYPE to be populated with ORDER_LINE_ITEM.ALLOC_TYPE The created Allocation Inventory Detail record is updated to populate custom column ALLOC_INVN_DTL. MISC_ALPHA_FIELD_4 with the same value. Note: ALLOC_INVN_DTL .SHIP_WAVE_NBR = ORDER_LINE_ITEM.TASK_GENRTN_REF_NBR and ORDER_LINE_ITEM.ITEM_ID = ALLOC_INVN_DTL = ITEM_ID with matching WaveAllocationType Tasks are created as part of the wave process. Note: If a single replenishment task is tied to more than 1 billing TimeStamp , then WM will select the first not null record and utilize that billing time for the remaining AID.MISC_ALPHA_FIELD_4 and TDL.MISC_ALPHA_FIELD_4 task details associated to that task. The created cigarette replenishment tasks are updated to populate custom column TASK_DTL.MISC_ALPHA_FIELD4 with the same value. Note: TASK_DTL.ALLOC_INVN_DTL_ID=ALLOC_INVN_DTL.ALLOC_INVN_DTL_ID UI No UI changes in scope for this extension. MHE No MHE changes in scope for this extension. RF No RF changes in scope for this extension. Process Change/Addition Adjust Location Inventory Web Service Overview The import processes for distribution order and sh ipment with full order are modified to include the below custom field, which is used as a reference field during import to enter BillingTime value into WMOS. This is located within the < LineItem > section. Field Name Data Type Description BillingTime Varchar ( 20) Contains BillingTime value If that field is null or not present , no further updates are made. If it contains a value, WMOS will use the value held there to fill ORDER_LINE_ITEM. REF_FIELD11 . Table Name Column Name Data Type Description Nullable? ORDER_LINE_ITEM REF_FIELD11 Varchar( 20) Contains BillingTime value Y Next, a wave is run . If the wave does not contain a distribution order or shipment where ORDER_LINE_ITEM. REF_FIELD11 is populated, no further updates are made. If does contain a populated value, proceed with the logic as follows. If an allocation inventory detail is created where th e corresponding ITEM_ CBO .REF_FIELD10 value ! = 'CIGS' , no further updates are made. If it does equal ‘CIGS’, proceed with the logic described below. Table Name Column Name Data Type Description Nullable? ALLOC_INVN_DTL C_EX93_ALLOC_TYPE Varchar( 3 ) Contains alloc _type from order_line_item Y If each of the requirements above are met, new custom field ALLOC_INVN_DTL.MISC_ALPHA_FIELD_4 is populated with the BillingTime value. Table Name Column Name Data Type Description Nullable? ALLOC_INVN_DTL MISC_ALPHA_FIELD_4 Varchar( 20) Contains BillingTime value Y Once an ALLOC_INVN_DTL record is processed, regardless of whether MISC_ALPHA_FIELD_4 is populated with BillingTime (which is dependent on the ITEM_ CBO .REF_FIELD10 value = ‘CIGS’ as described above) the below custom boolean is updated to reflect that it has been processed. This will prevent the wave from reprocessing records. Table Name Column Name Data Type Description Nullable? ALLOC_INVN_DTL EX93_FLAG Numeric( 1,0) Flag to indicate whether allocation record has been processed Y When a task correlated to that Allocation Inventory Detail is created, new custom field TASK_DTL.MISC_ALPHA_FIELD4 is populated with the BillingTime value. If there is more than one Billin g Time value available, the first returned value will be accepted and used as the Billin g Time without consideration. Table Name Column Name Data Type Description Nullable? TASK_DTL MISC_ALPHA_FIELD_4 Varchar( 20) Contains BillingTime value Y Enablement The following section describes the custom configuration required to enable this portion of the extension. First, the global modifications flag must be enabled. This is controlled through the custom system code C000 code ID 000 parameter byte 1-1. This parameter is configured as a Y/N flag. If the flag is set to ‘Y’, then WMOS continues to the next enablement validation. Otherwise, if this flag is set to ‘N’, the global extension control is turned off, and only base processing will occur. Second, the extension specific global flag must be enabled. This is controlled through the custom system code C000 code ID EX93 byte 1-1. This parameter is configured as a Y/N flag. If the flag is set to ‘Y’, then WMOS continues to the custom processing below. Otherwise, if the flag is set to ‘N’, the extension specific control for EX93 is turned off, and no custom EX93 processing will occur. Updates Perform base inventory adjustment updates. Activity Tracking No changes to base behavior for activity tracking as part of this extension. PIX No changes to base behavior for PIX generation as part of this extension. LM Hooks Not in scope as part of this extension. Reporting , Label, or Document Not report, label or document changes in scope for this extension. Other Solutions Included in Extension Not in scope for this extension. Performance Expectations There should be no change to the current xml import process performance. Waves? Required Data Setup All necessary data setup for the extension to function accurately are detailed below. System Codes Code ID Details Parameter Configuration Rec Type Code Type Code ID Short Description Description Fr o m To Description Validation Type Configured value C 000 000 Global Extension Control Global Extension Control 1 1 Enablement Flag Check Box Y/N Flag Y – Global Extension Control is turned ON C 000 EX 93 EX93 Extension Control EX93 Extension Control 1 1 Enablement Flag Check Box Y/N Flag Y – EX93 Extension Control is turned ON Database The WMOS database is enhanced to include the below custom fields which are populated with the BillingTime value as imported on < ItemSubstitutionCodeValue >. These fields are also added to the archive schema. Table Name Column Name Data Type Description Nullable? ORDER_LINE_ITEM REF_FIELD11 Varchar( 20) Contains BillingTime value Y ALLOC_IN V N_DTL MISC_ALPHA_FIELD_4 Varchar( 20) Contains BillingTime value Y ALLOC_INVN_DTL EX93_FLAG Numeric( 1,0) Processing indicator flag Y ALLOC_INVN_DTL C_EX93_ALLOC_TYPE Varchar( 3) Contains allocation type Y TASK_DTL MISC_ALPHA_FIELD_4 Varchar( 20) Contains BillingTime value Y Purge and Archive All custom fields should be purged and archive d when purge and archive is run on the related ORDER_LINE_ITEM, ALLOC_INVN_DTL , and TASK_DTL tables. Custom Configurations System Code Types Rec Type Code Type Code Desc RF Desc Max Len . Allow Add Allow Delete Allow Parm Maint Allow Desc Mod WHSE/ BU/ Ent P arm Exist Order by C 000 Global Extensi on Control 4 Y Y Y Y WHSE Y Code Id System Code Parameters Rec Type Code Type From Byte To Byte Parm Desc Parameter Validation C 000 1 1 Enablement Flag Check Box Y/N Flag Messages Module Message ID Message Class Message Type Message Detail Value Test Cases General C onditions Condition Name Description and expectations Questions and Answers This below table is used to track questions that were asked and answered regarding this enhancement. If the question resulted in any action it is listed against the question. # Asked By Question Answered By Answer Date Added Action Taken 1 2 3 4 5

If the flag is set to ‘Y’, then WMOS continues to the custom processing below. Otherwise, if the flag is set to ‘N’, the extension specific control for EX93 is turned off, and no custom EX93 processing will occur. Updates Perform base inventory adjustment updates.
